query:
-- ตรวจสอบว่าสัญญา CT1125-PTE012-18568-01 (external_id=19654) มี payment_transactions ใน DB ไหม
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_payments,
  SUM(CASE WHEN receipt_no IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_receipt,
  SUM(CASE WHEN receipt_no IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as without_receipt,
  SUM(CAST(amount AS DECIMAL(18,2))) as total_amount,
  MAX(paid_at) as latest_paid_at
FROM payment_transactions
WHERE contract_external_id = '19654' AND section = 'Fastfone365';

  SUM(CASE WHEN receipt_no IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_receipt,
  SUM(CASE WHEN receipt_no IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as without_receipt,
  SUM(CAST(amount AS DECIMAL(18,2))) as total_amount,
